creator: exploringlondon
caption:
The @gisou x @spacenk Gloss-o-meter has arrived in London for two days only! ad-pr

Here you’ll get a free, personalised hair analysis, a photo booth experience, free samples, stickers and if you purchase your Honey Gloss favourites from Space NK Neal Street, there’s also limited edition merch available!

📍 @coventgardenldn Piazza, London, WC2E 8HD
🗓️ 5th-6th June
⏰ 9am-7pm

transcription.text: Gisu are opening a brand new pop-up in the middle of Covent Garden for two days only. Say hello to their Gloss-O-Meter celebrating their brand new honey gloss collagen drop. Start off by filling in a form about your hair and then you'll get the chance to run through this with one of their experts and based on your answers you'll get a specific coloured band that you'll need when you go and get your personalised gloss scan where you can discover your ideal hair care routine and at the end you'll realise that this is also a photo boost so you'll get to take away some photos. You'll get to take away free samples, stickers and even have the chance to win full-size products and if you do purchase your honey gloss favourites you can also get some limited edition merch while stocks last. It's so much fun, definitely want to check out, find the details in the caption.
